actions.value:
"The list of Restricted jurisdictions for the provision of the Services includes: Afghanistan,  Belarus, Cuba, Hawaii (state of the US), Iran, Iraq, Louisiana (state of the US), Myanmar, New York (state of the US), North Korea, Russia, Somalia, South Sudan, Sudan, Syria, Venezuela, Yemen, and geographies with unrecognized or disputed status."
(source: https://paybis.com/policies/terms-of-service)


Are you in one of these locations?
